summary: HUD module: health bars with smooth tween/shrink, score digits, stock icons, character portraits, round timer, results overlay (KO/victory/defeat), dust hit effects.

functions.name: hud_dust_fade_cb
functions.summary: Dust particle slow fade: alpha–8 for first 12 frames, then alpha–3, mark dead.

functions.name: hud_dust_fast_fade_cb
functions.summary: Dust particle fast fade: wait on x_0f4167b4[1] timer, then alpha–8/–2 for 8 frames.

functions.name: hud_bone_to_world
functions.summary: Transform a bone's local position to world coordinates via mat4 chain.

functions.name: hud_circular_offset
functions.summary: Offset a position by radius+angle: sqrt(horizontal distance) × sin/cos from atan2_lut.

functions.name: hud_dust_spawn_cb
functions.summary: Timer callback: spawns a dust hit sprite at reference object position, tracks count in x_0f4167b4[1].

functions.name: hud_dust_spawner
functions.summary: Init dust spawner: creates a task with hud_dust_spawn_cb, configures timing (delay=4, interval=3).

functions.name: hud_dust_follow_player
functions.summary: Attach dust object to player's feet position (takes bone transform from x_abd7b3c4), then switch to fast fade.

functions.name: hud_dust_sp3_init
functions.summary: Sprite init callback from 'dusthit.sp3': sets follow-player as first callback.

functions.name: hud_dust_ring_spawn
functions.summary: Spawn ring of 5 dust hit effects at player position. Each has different radius (150/50/-200/100/-250) and alpha (60/60/40/40/30). Called from eff_hit.c on hit impact.

functions.name: hud_dust_line_spawn
functions.summary: Spawn line of 13 dust hit effects at increasing radius (−250 to +350, step 50). Called from eff_hit.c for heavy hits.

functions.name: hud_ko_countdown
functions.summary: Round end timer: disable controllers, wait 240 frames (KO display), then trigger x_bee364e0 transition.

functions.name: hud_health_width
functions.summary: Calculate health bar pixel width: player HP × 80 ÷ 400 (returns fixed-point s16).

functions.name: hud_quad_submit
functions.summary: Submit an XLU vertex quad to the extra batch for health bar rendering. Uses GT ucode with G_RM_XLU_SURF.

functions.name: hud_health_bar_update
functions.summary: Continuous health bar update task. Slides the bar left (P1) / right (P2) toward target width with a 30-frame flash animation. Renders via hud_quad_submit.

functions.name: hud_round_win_anim
functions.summary: Compare HP → play win/lose moves: player_exec_move with x_fefa7415 (win) or x_f6ac8484 (lose). Tie → both get lose.

functions.name: hud_timer_cb
functions.summary: Match countdown: 60-frame delay, decrements timer object's frameCounter 0→9 cyclically. When done, set sFightLocked = TRUE (time over).

functions.name: hud_timer_start
functions.summary: Start the match timer: inject hud_timer_cb into sTimerObj, set initial delay 0.

functions.name: hud_score_cleanup
functions.summary: Free score digit objects and their children by setting x_f51cb721 flag. Increments D_80081434/D_80081438 counters.

functions.name: hud_score_create
functions.summary: Create score digit sprites from 'bars.sp2'. Handles hundreds/tens/ones per player, assigns frameCounter for digit glyph, frees task list for static display.

functions.name: hud_setup
functions.summary: Main HUD initialisation. Creates: timer sprite, round indicator icons (bars.sp2), health bar model parts (P1 left, P2 right), character portraits from D_8004A5D0/D_8004A680, score digits, and launches hud_health_bar_update task. Called from menu.c scene transitions.

functions.name: results_ko_fade
functions.summary: KO overlay: renders model with decreasing sFadeAlpha (sAlpha−2 per frame), triggers x_700de048 transition when frameCounter hits 2.

functions.name: results_final_fade
functions.summary: Final fade-out: render XLU quad at current sFadeAlpha, then mark object dead.

functions.name: results_attract_skip
functions.summary: Result screen state: wait 130 frames, then transition to attract mode (SCREEN_ATTRACT).

functions.name: results_wait_timer
functions.summary: Result screen state: after timer runs down (frameCounter ≤ 60), switch to controls-hint mode.

functions.name: results_p1_control_skip
functions.summary: P1: wait for start button → skip the result or switch to controls-continue mode.

functions.name: results_p1_control_continue
functions.summary: P1: wait for start → show controls, or other → go back to skip mode.

functions.name: results_show_controls
functions.summary: Transition state: after 118 frames, switch to controls-continue mode.

functions.name: results_p1_controls_hint
functions.summary: P1 initial state: wait for start → show controls, or back → switch to pause menu.

functions.name: results_p1_pause
functions.summary: P1: start → trigger KO fade-out, or back → return to controls hint (with 60-frame delay).

functions.name: results_fade_in
functions.summary: Fade-in overlay: sFadeAlpha+2 per frame until 58, then switch to pause mode.

functions.name: results_init
functions.summary: Initialise result screen: set first callback to fade-in, unlock task queue, clear flag x_c537cafa, set sFadeAlpha=0.

functions.name: results_portrait_flicker
functions.summary: Character portrait flicker: 16 frames with delay=2, then hide.

globals.name: sDustHitObjDef
globals.summary: Object prototype for dust hit sprite (dusthit.sp3)

globals.name: sRoundWinCount
globals.summary: Round win counter, inc from present.c on victory

globals.name: sHealthBarSlideL
globals.summary: Left health bar slide offset (shrink animation)

globals.name: sHealthBarSlideR
globals.summary: Right health bar slide offset (shrink animation)

globals.name: sHealthBarVtxL
globals.summary: Left health bar vertex template (2 framebuffers × 4 verts)

globals.name: sHealthBarVtxR
globals.summary: Right health bar vertex template (2 framebuffers × 4 verts)

globals.name: sDigitPos
globals.summary: Score digit screen positions (6 entries: P1 units/tens/hundreds, P2 hundreds/tens/units)

globals.name: sDigitPosPtr
globals.summary: Pointer array to sDigitPos entries

globals.name: sCachedHealthL
globals.summary: Cached P1 health bar width (for delta detection)

globals.name: sCachedHealthR
globals.summary: Cached P2 health bar width

globals.name: sHealthPartL
globals.summary: P1 health bar model part pointer

globals.name: sHealthPartR
globals.summary: P2 health bar model part pointer

globals.name: sHudRootObj
globals.summary: Root HUD task object (created in match.c as match_task_exec task)

globals.name: sTimerObj
globals.summary: Timer display object

globals.name: sHealthBarTask
globals.summary: Health bar update task object

globals.name: sScoreObj
globals.summary: Score digit container object

globals.name: sWinnerIdx
globals.summary: Current round winner player index

globals.name: sIsDraw
globals.summary: Draw/tie flag

globals.name: sHudActive
globals.summary: HUD active flag — checked by combat/projectile/eff_hit to skip hit effects during HUD fades

globals.name: sHudUnused
globals.summary: Unused BSS variable

globals.name: sRoundIndicators
globals.summary: Round indicator stock icons (2 players × 10 max)

globals.name: sHealthFlashL
globals.summary: Left health bar flash timer (30-frame animation)

globals.name: sHealthFlashR
globals.summary: Right health bar flash timer

subsystems: Health bar tween: delta-driven slide with flash animation (30 frames), GT ucode XLU quad
Score digit rendering: hundreds/tens/ones from bars.sp2 sprite sheet
Result screen FSM: fade-in → controls-hint → skip → pause/continue → attract
Dust hit particles: ring (5) and line (13) spawns triggered from eff_hit.c on impact
Timer: 60 fps countdown, triggers time-over flag sFightLocked
open_questions: D_80081434/D_80081438 referenced in hud_score_cleanup — where defined? Are they debug alloc counters?
